mapper.insert: INSERT INTO device_detection_event ( party_id, detected_device, detected_location, detected_at, status, notified_user_ids, expires_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{partyId}, #{detectedDevice}, #{detectedLocation}, #{detectedAt}, #{status}, #{notifiedUserIds}, #{expiresAt}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM device_detection_event WHERE party_id = #{partyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM device_detection_event WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND expires_at < #{now}
